chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C. P.No.D-6061 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) Disposed of matter: 1. For orders on CMA No.20317/2024. 2. For orders on CMA No.20318/2024. 12.09.2025 Mr. Muteeullah Gondal, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ziauddin Junejo, A.A.G. ********** Instant petition was disposed of vide order dated 22.08.2024 with the observation that the petitioner may approach the concerned Department with an appropriate application for renewal of its route permit, which may be considered in accordance with law. Learned counsel submits that petitioner had made such an application but the same was not considered by the concerned authorities. In that case the petitioner has a fresh cause of action and is free to bring a fresh petition. With that observation, instant CMA being 20318/2024 along with CMA No.20317/2024 is dismissed as not maintainable in a disposed of petition. JUDGE JUDGE NADEEM
